items.title: Good Bad Ugly
items.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/4sihm6ayml06/good-bad-ugly-2025-uncut-720p-hindi-tamil-web-dl-5-1-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Meeting
episodes.overview: Despised by her stepmother and sister, Miyo is treated like a servant in her own home. One day, her father calls her in to discuss her future.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ttxcochlj9g2/my-happy-marriage-s01e01-the-meeting-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: About My Husband-to-Be
episodes.overview: Determined to be of use, Miyo wakes up early and prepares breakfast, but Kiyoka accuses her of trying to poison him and refuses to take a bite.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/y48e0c9724az/my-happy-marriage-s01e02-about-my-husband-to-be-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Our First Date
episodes.overview: While Kiyoka takes Miyo out to town, he quickly notices that she behaves very differently from other wealthy daughters he's encountered.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/239skqowmf4j/my-happy-marriage-s01e03-our-first-date-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Gift
episodes.overview: To surprise Kiyoka with a handmade gift, Miyo goes into town to shop for some material. Meanwhile, Kiyoka pays Miyo's parents a visit.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/7dwty6r4c6nm/my-happy-marriage-s01e04-the-gift-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Ripples
episodes.overview: Engulfed with jealousy, Kaya tries to thwart Miyo's engagement to Kiyoka. Miyo leaves the house and forgets to bring the good luck charm Kiyoka gave her.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/36jnk09hrw04/my-happy-marriage-s01e05-ripples-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Determination and Thunder
episodes.overview: Miyo wakes up to her sister and stepmother threatening her. Together with Koji, Kiyoka arrives at the Saimori home and demands to see his fiancée.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/hblzdc4v78tu/my-happy-marriage-s01e06-determination-and-thunder-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Glamorous Lady of Summer
episodes.overview: Kiyoka accompanies Miyo to the remains of the Saimori home at her request. Later, a stunning visitor comes by their home.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/70j6xa3lzs3a/my-happy-marriage-s01e07-glamorous-lady-of-summer-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Nightmares and Ominous Shadows
episodes.overview: Hazuki and Miyo grow closer through their lessons. Worried, Kiyoka tries to get to the bottom of Miyo's relentless nightmares.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ztbe2qp1nnsi/my-happy-marriage-s01e08-nightmares-and-ominous-shadows-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Drowning in Dreams
episodes.overview: Though distressed by her nightmares, Miyo keeps pushing herself to be a supportive wife. Then, Arata Tsuruki comes to speak to her while Kiyoka is away.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/9w5ywdxvy8r5/my-happy-marriage-s01e09-drowning-in-dreams-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Summer Cherry Blossoms, and the Mistake
episodes.overview: Arata reveals his true identity and introduces Miyo to the grandfather she never knew. They claim they can cure her nightmares — on one condition.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/1iui6ehp6itm/my-happy-marriage-s01e10-summer-cherry-blossoms-and-the-mistake-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: My Mother's Legacy
episodes.overview: Yoshiro Usuba tells Miyo about how her mother came to marry her father — and why she made a decision that changed her only daughter's life forever.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/eet52c57u98e/my-happy-marriage-s01e11-my-mothers-legacy-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Light in the Darkness
episodes.overview: Miyo's powers are everyone's last hope of waking Kiyoka from his unconscious state. But before she can rescue him, she must face the shadow of her past.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/2qtp311w7om8/my-happy-marriage-s01e12-light-in-the-darkness-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Another Kudo Residence
episodes.overview: While out shopping, Miyo has a chilling vision — only to be surprised by her future father-in-law, who invites her and Kiyoka to their countryside estate.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/jlzdqjf0wle9/my-happy-marriage-s01e13-episode-13-ova-720p-10bit-hindi-japanese-english-esubs-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: A New Ordeal
episodes.overview: Unhappy with her son's engagement, Fuyu commands Miyo to perform housekeeping duties. Meanwhile, Kiyoka makes a shocking discovery at an abandoned house.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/r9jow6jtv031/my-happy-marriage-s02e01-720p-hin-eng-jap-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Gifted Communion and Demons
episodes.overview: As Miyo tries to save a villager using Dream-Sight, Kiyoka battles a demon. Later, Arata shares surprising information on the Gifted Communion's founder.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/1nkglfj1p16e/my-happy-marriage-s02e02-720p-hin-eng-jap-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: What the Autumn Breeze Brought
episodes.overview: Upon returning to the capital, the group has an unsettling encounter with Naoshi Usui. Kiyoka assigns Miyo a bodyguard: the dashing Kaoruko Jinnouchi.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/jehrwj8yy1t0/my-happy-marriage-s02e03-720p-hin-eng-jap-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Deep Within the Heart
episodes.overview: Miyo overhears soldiers disparaging Kaoruko and defends her friend. Later, she has a troubling nightmare. Is it just a dream or a glimpse of the future?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/yxih0ssfbo6f/my-happy-marriage-s02e04-720p-hin-eng-jap-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Man Called Naoshi Usui
episodes.overview: As Kiyoka rushes to meet Arata at the imperial family's vacation estate, Usui surprises Miyo and her guards at the dojo, revealing a traitor among them.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/cxf3d27geknx/my-happy-marriage-s02e05-720p-hin-eng-jap-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: A New Year's Commotion
episodes.overview: After a tender New Year's Eve, Miyo and Kiyoka make their first shrine visit together. Meanwhile, Takahito learns of growing unrest in the streets.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/tu8rbb3jfqgy/my-happy-marriage-s02e06-720p-hin-eng-jap-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: An Evening Banquet and Distant Snow
episodes.overview: At a surprise gathering, Hazuki and her guests share their thoughts on love. Later, Miyo's worries grow after learning of Takahito's ominous vision.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/qgipbvi7acmv/my-happy-marriage-s02e07-720p-hevc-hin-eng-jap-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Dream Tidings
episodes.overview: While Kiyoka's unit investigates a strange demon, the Gifted Communion makes a ruthless move. Miyo enters a foreboding dream where a young Usui awaits.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/dp9e4vs7lpby/my-happy-marriage-s02e08-720p-hin-eng-jap-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Promise
episodes.overview: Determined to save her fiancé, Miyo sneaks out and runs into a young boy with a familiar face. Later, she dreams of a tragic promise from the past.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/sti6l48vng4d/my-happy-marriage-s02e09-720p-hin-eng-jap-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: A Resolute Departure
episodes.overview: After awakening from her dream, Miyo begins to gather allies for the rescue mission. Will her blossoming powers be enough to save Kiyoka and stop Usui?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/1tqnu487wrnc/my-happy-marriage-s02e10-720p-hin-eng-jap-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Feelings Beyond Dreams
episodes.overview: In the final battle, Usui overwhelms Kiyoka, trapping him in a terrible nightmare. Desperate to prevent more bloodshed, Miyo dives into the dream.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/h56kof0wfvq0/my-happy-marriage-s02e11-hindi-english-japanese-720p-web-dl-esub-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Once Spring Has Come
episodes.overview: After the battle, Miyo confides in Arata about her regrets. Kiyoka makes a big life decision. Later, Hazuki surprises Miyo with a heartfelt wedding gift.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/fvkl28akyg8w/my-happy-marriage-s02e12-hindi-english-japanese-720p-web-dl-esub-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Episode 26
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/js3hcfzl27za/my-happy-marriage-s02e13-hindi-english-japanese-720p-web-dl-esub-vegamovies-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>
